languages.text: [Напасть] "Гореть вам за ложь и ересь перед ликом Императора!"

[Напасть] "Гореть вам за ложь и ересь перед ликом Императора!"

languages.text: [Attack] "You will burn for spewing lies and heresy before the Emperor's face!"

[Attack] "You will burn for spewing lies and heresy before the Emperor's face!"

languages.text: [Angriff] "Du wirst dafür brennen, dass du vor dem Antlitz des Kaisers Lügen und Ketzerei verbreitest!"
languages.original_text: [Attack] "You will burn for spewing lies and heresy before the Emperor's face!"

languages.text: [Attaque] "Vous brûlerez pour avoir proféré des mensonges et de l'hérésie devant l'Empereur !"
languages.original_text: [Attack] "You will burn for spewing lies and heresy before the Emperor's face!"

languages.text: [攻击]"你将因在皇帝面前散布谎言和异端邪说而被烧死！"
languages.original_text: [Attack] "You will burn for spewing lies and heresy before the Emperor's face!"

languages.text: [Ataque] "¡Arderás por vomitar mentiras y herejías ante la cara del Emperador!"
languages.original_text: [Attack] "You will burn for spewing lies and heresy before the Emperor's face!"

languages.text: [攻撃]"皇帝の面前で嘘と異端を吹き込んだ罪で焼かれるぞ！"
languages.original_text: [Attack] "You will burn for spewing lies and heresy before the Emperor's face!"

languages.text: [Saldırı] "İmparatorun yüzü önünde yalan ve sapkınlık saçtığınız için yanacaksınız!"
languages.original_text: [Attack] "You will burn for spewing lies and heresy before the Emperor's face!"
